summary_en: 414,000 shares (2.25% of S/O) to be acquired at ¥777/share via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-18, total outlay ¥321.68M. Execution at open (08:45 JST). Under authorization granted 2025-10-31 for up to 1.2M shares / ¥750M through 2026-05-29; cumulative acquisitions as of filing date: 422,200 shares / ¥285.57M.
title_en: Notice of Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Nippon Felt Company Limited filed notice on 2026-05-15 of a share repurchase block to be executed the following trading day via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading. The company will acquire 414,000 shares (2.25% of shares outstanding) at ¥777 per share, the closing price on the filing date, for a total outlay of ¥321.68M. The purchase order is time-limited to the 08:45 JST open auction window on 2026-05-18. This block repurchase is conducted under a board resolution from 2025-10-31 that authorized up to 1.2M shares (not disclosed as a percentage ceiling) or ¥750M in aggregate through 2026-05-29. As of the filing date, the company had already acquired 422,200 shares for ¥285.57M under this authorization. The company notes that market conditions may result in partial or full non-execution of the planned purchase.
